articles.title: U.S. Senator Buys $600K in Bitcoin via ETF
articles.description: Senator David McCormick purchases up to $600K Bitcoin ETF, impacting crypto markets.

articles.title: Solana Meme Coin Spikes as Elon Musk Hints at Vine Revival
articles.description: Dogecoin fan Elon Musk appeared to have given the go ahead for video app Vine to be revived, causing a related meme coin to spike.

articles.title: Ethereum-Bitcoin Ratio Drops To Five-Year Low
articles.description: %Ethereum (CRYPTO: $ETH) price has fallen 39% this year relative to %Bitcoin (CRYPTO: $BTC), taking the ratio between the two largest %Cryptocurrencies to its lowest level in five years. The drop in

articles.title: Strategy announces another purchase of 22,048 BTC
articles.description: Michael Saylor's Strategy announced the completion of another Bitcoin (BTC) purchase, adding 22,048 BTC valued at $1. 92B.

articles.title: Altcoins see inflows for first time in 5 weeks as ‘positive but cautious’ investors add $226 million to global crypto funds: CoinShares
articles.description: Bitcoin investors added $195 million to global products while altcoin-based funds saw net inflows for the first time in five weeks.

articles.title: Bukele May Visit Trump as Bitcoin Goals Align
articles.description: President Bukele may visit Trump at the White House, sparking talk of stronger ties and shared goals on Bitcoin and national crypto reserves.

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin introduces multi-proof security model amid Ethereum volatility
articles.description: 31-3-2025 – Ethereum’s visionary co-founder Vitalik Buterin has unveiled an innovative security framework that could revolutionise Layer 2 solutions, whilst the network grapples with market volatility challenges. The pioneering architecture, dubbed the “multi-proof model”, artfully weaves together three distinct verification methods: optimistic proofs, zero-knowledge (ZK) proofs, and trusted execution environments (TEE).
